entrypoint_argv = ['uv', 'run', 'circopt.py']
tmp_path = PosixPath('/tmp/pytest-of-agent/pytest-0/test_check_file_not_found0')

    def test_check_file_not_found(
        entrypoint_argv: list[str],
        tmp_path: Path,
    ) -> None:
        missing = tmp_path / "missing.circ"
        result, payload = run_json_command(
            entrypoint_argv,
            ["check", str(missing), "--json"],
        )
        assert result.returncode == 1
>       assert_error_payload(

            command="check",
            error_type="FileNotFoundError",
            exit_code=1,
        )
